g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the shopper initiate the photo transformation flow?')
sendPrompt('What does Temporal do when it receives the recommendation job?')
sendPrompt('What does the moderation activity check for?')
sendPrompt('What is the moderation worker doing exactly?')
sendPrompt('How does the EmotionBrief extraction work?')
sendPrompt('What structured output does GPT produce for an EmotionBrief?')
sendPrompt('How are candidate concepts retrieved from the database?')
sendPrompt('How does pgvector similarity search work for concept retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How does the bundle composer validate inventory?')
sendPrompt('What does the bundle composer check against in the commerce layer?')
sendPrompt('How does the scene segmentation activity work?')
sendPrompt('What model is used to segment the entryway from the photo?')
sendPrompt('How is the transformation image prompt constructed?')
sendPrompt('What OpenAI Images API parameters are used for transformation?')
sendPrompt('What does the QC scoring activity check?')
sendPrompt('What quality signals does QC scoring measure?')
sendPrompt('How does the human approval queue work in Temporal?')
sendPrompt('What gets persisted to the database at the end of the workflow?')
sendPrompt('How does the response return to the client after the workflow completes?')
